zh.title: 死海古卷预言全集 - 库姆兰社区末世预言与解读 | Dead Sea Scrolls Prophecies
zh.description: 死海古卷（约公元前200年-公元68年）中的预言性与末世论文本完整收录，包括战争卷轴、哈巴谷注释、圣殿卷轴、弥赛亚文本等。1947年在库姆兰洞穴发现，是20世纪最重大的考古发现之一。
zh.keywords: 死海古卷,死海古卷预言,库姆兰,战争卷轴,哈巴谷注释,圣殿卷轴,弥赛亚,末世论,犹太教,考古发现
zh.ogTitle: 死海古卷预言全集 | Dead Sea Scrolls Prophecies
zh.ogDescription: 死海古卷中的预言性与末世论文本完整收录与学术解读。涵盖战争卷轴、哈巴谷注释、弥赛亚文本等。
zh.twitterDescription: 死海古卷中的末世预言文本完整收录，包含战争卷轴、哈巴谷注释、弥赛亚文本等，1947年库姆兰洞穴出土。

en.title: Dead Sea Scrolls Prophecies - Eschatological Texts from Qumran (~200 BC - 68 AD) | Full Archive
en.description: Prophetic and apocalyptic texts from the Dead Sea Scrolls (~200 BC - 68 AD), discovered in 1947 in the Qumran caves. Includes the War Scroll, Pesher Habakkuk, Temple Scroll, Messianic texts, and Community Rule prophecies.
en.ogTitle: Dead Sea Scrolls Prophecies - Eschatological Texts from Qumran
en.ogDescription: Prophetic and apocalyptic texts from the Dead Sea Scrolls, discovered in 1947. Includes War Scroll, Pesharim, Temple Scroll, and Messianic prophecies.
en.twitterDescription: Prophetic texts from the Dead Sea Scrolls: War Scroll, Pesher Habakkuk, Messianic prophecies. Discovered 1947 in Qumran caves.
